subcodes.first_line: O thou maidservant of God! Thy letter was received, and its contents testified to thy firmness in the Covenant… Now one must either say that the Blessed Beauty erred and led the people astray
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز الهی نامه شما رسید مضامین دلالت بر ثبوت بر میثاق داشت لهذا امید چنان
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @interpretation of dreams and visions, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @role of the Covenant in preserving unity, @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers, @soul; spirit after death
